title: PrimalStorage
body:
![PrimalStorage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/l6bP7aHn/images/c196372fab98e41f0e0577644dabee05288b55d0.png)

This mod adds basic storage blocks, such as item shelves, crates, and fluid barrels, providing the player with early game storage that fits with a primitive survival experience.

Items shelves have four slots and render the contained item or block, there is no gui, the player interacts directly with the shelf slots by clicking the desired location.

Currently the mod only features the item shelves, additional storage blocks are planned and will be added in future releases.

![Requires Fabric API](https://images2.imgbox.com/8e/38/bfInI5qv_o.png)
